title: Timothy Blanchard
compiled_truth: Timothy Blanchard is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-27 to 2002-05-06), Timothy Blanchard sent 30 and received 794 emails, totalling 824 interactions. Top correspondents: [Eric Bass](people/eric-bass) (19), [Matthew Lenhart](people/matthew-lenhart) (10), [Bryan Hull](people/bryan-hull) (10), [Chad Landry](people/chad-landry) (9), [Randy Bhatia](people/randy-bhatia) (7).
